description: A new fleet of 'MedTech Vitals Gateways' is being deployed. To monitor them properly in OpManager, you must configure a custom Service Monitor and a Device Template. Read the specification file at ~/Desktop/gateway_specs.txt for the exact parameters. You must create the Service Monitor, create the Device Template, and ensure the Service Monitor is associated with the template. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
